LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANTS UNITED PARCEL SERVICE, INCORPORATED AND LISA GONZALES' MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE TO SAN MATEO IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION BY JUDGE CURTIS KARNOW. AFTER HEARING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS UNITED PARCEL SERVICE, INCORPORATED AND LISA GONZALES' MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE TO SAN MATEO IS DENIED. THERE IS NO SHOWING THAT SAN FRANCISCO IS AN IMPROPER VENUE. WHERE THERE ARE HERE BOTH INDIVIDUAL AND CORPORATE DEFENDANTS, VENUE IS PROPER IN ANY COUNTY WHERE VENUE IS PROPER AS TO ANY DEFENDANT. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CURTIS KARNOW, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

ATTY. JUDY LIAO OF MARANGA & MORGENSTERN, TEL. NO. 818-587-9146 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANTS UNITED PARCEL SERVICE, INCORPORATED AND LISA GONZALES' Motion To Transfer Venue to San Mateo IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION BY JUDGE CURTIS KARNOW. AFTER HEARING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS UNITED PARCEL SERVICE, INCORPORATED AND LISA GONZALES' Motion To Transfer Venue to San Mateo is Denied. There is no showing that San Francisco is an improper venue. Where there are here both individual and corporate defendants, venue is proper in any county where venue is proper as to any defendant. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Curtis Karnow, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =302/CK
